Work

Projects

Hardware-first robotics and embedded systems projects built from scratch.

01 / 04
Gesture Controlled Robot Using Flex Sensor & TinyML
Gesture-controlled wheelchair/robot with flex-sensor glove transmitter and TinyML on ESP32-CAM. Features <100ms latency and on-device inference — no cloud dependency. Presented at NCAIDIET'25.
ESP32 TensorFlow Lite Flex Sensors TinyML Ultrasonic
GitHub
02 / 04
Autonomous Navigation Robot — LiDAR & ROS2
Full ROS2 Humble stack with SLAM Toolbox for real-time occupancy grid mapping, AMCL localization, and NAV2 path planning. YDLIDAR X2 for 360° detection, Pi Camera with YOLO object recognition.
ROS2 SLAM Toolbox NAV2 YDLIDAR X2 Raspberry Pi 4 OpenCV YOLO
Private / In Progress
03 / 04
Autonomous Pick & Place Robot — Arduino & ESP32
3D-printed 4-DOF robotic arm mounted on a 4-wheel drive platform. Servo-controlled arm with ultrasonic sensing for object detection and autonomous pick-and-place sequences.
Arduino ESP32 Servo Motors 3D Printing Ultrasonic
GitHub
🏦
Banking System
C++ · OOP · STL
04 / 04
Advanced Banking Management System — C++ OOP & STL
Console-based banking system in C++ with full OOP design — classes, inheritance, encapsulation. Account management, transactions, and persistent file-based storage using STL data structures.
C++ OOP STL File Handling Data Structures
